description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.13 Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named build that runs the command go build ./.... In the test stage add a job named test that runs the commands test -z "$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)" to ensure formatting, then go test -cover ./..., then installs golangci-lint version v1.21.0 via curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin v1.21.0, and finally runs golangci-lint run -v. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules, so all jobs run on every pipeline.
